Call ID: EXT-004
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-14
Topic: Churn Risk & Escalation
Participants: Raj (account manager); Yuki (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Raj): Hi Yuki, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Yuki): If we can't get the compliance features, we may have to move on.
AM (Raj): Let me get you a firm commitment on the compliance roadmap.
Customer (Yuki): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Raj): I'll escalate the reliability concerns to our VP directly.
Customer (Yuki): I appreciate the candor, but we'll need to see real change fast.
AM (Raj): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
